title: Resource Allocation Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger resource allocation foundations judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Resource Allocation Foundations is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Resource Allocation Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good resource allocation foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Resource Allocation Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
